message:
feat(mobile): Enhance mobile UX with refined touch targets and spacing

Comprehensive mobile improvements focusing on touch accessibility,
visual clarity, and device-specific optimizations.

mobile-overrides.css:
- Added notch/dynamic-island safe area support via env(safe-area-inset-*)
- .app-header now respects safe-area-inset-top for notched devices
- .app-footer uses safe-area-inset-bottom for home indicator
- New @supports rule for safe area padding detection
- .overlay-wrapper respects all four safe area insets
- .btn minimum touch target enforced at 44x44px (WCAG 2.5.5)
- .list-item touch target minimum 48px height
- Enhanced .metrics grid for small screens (2 columns, smaller gap)
- .detail-card padding optimized for mobile (var(--space-4))
- .sequence-block uses smaller font on mobile for better fit
- .panel padding reduced to var(--space-3) on phones
- Landscape-specific optimizations for reduced vertical spacing

control-deck.css:
- Safe area padding applied to .control-deck bottom
- Refined spacing between deck buttons
- Better touch target sizing for control buttons

fab.css:
- .fab-btn respects safe-area-inset-bottom
- Additional margin for devices with home indicators

typography.css:
- Added .text-2xs utility (0.65rem) for compact labels
- Mobile-optimized font-size scaling for small viewports

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
